title: Authentic Beta
description: relive the golden age, without the hastle.
body:
![banner with the "authentic beta" text, with text beneath it that says "relive the golden age, without the hastle.", there is blurred minecraft terrain in the background and there is a simple golden border around the image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d362b6c4c0400cefd10f92f89317879a4a1aaa23.png) **Authentic Beta aims to recreate the Beta 1.7.3 experience as closely as possible on the latest-ish versions of Minecraft, so you don't have to deal with the hastle of playing the original. No more skin proxies or downgrading graphics drivers!** ## Features - No modern mobs, items, blocks, etc.! - No hunger or sprinting! - Old graphics and textures! - Old world gen! - Old achievements system! - Old recipes and block drops! - Better performance! - Compatibility with modern Fabric mods!
_And much more.._ ## Important Info - **World Generation** - [Moderner Beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta) world gen is pre-loaded, no need to change the world gen settings! - **Updates** - Expect frequent-ish updates to fix issues and add new features to perfect the (Authentic) Beta experience!
Feel free to report issues or suggest features in the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/yZSzsEfpRg) or [Issue tracker](https://codeberg.org/dianaisnthere/modern-beta-issues)! - **Video Settings** - The normal Sodium video settings can be shown by pressing shift-p! - Versions - The 1.20.1 version of the pack is the most accurate, and supports mods like Create which haven't been updated past 1.20.1 yet. It is the most optimal version of Authentic Beta. ## How to Install ### Client 1. **Download the Authentic Beta modpack** from the [versions page](https://modrinth.com/project/CRK4NXpU/versions) or inside of your mod launcher. 2. **Import the Authentic Beta modpack** into your launcher (if applicable). 3. **Play!** ### Server 1. **Download/Import the Server Version** of the Authentic Beta modpack from your server host's modpack section.
Can't install it that way? There are two other methods! ### mrpack-install If your server supports mrpack-install, you can use it to install Authentic Beta through command line! ### Manual If none of the above will work for you, you can install Authentic Beta on your server manually! 1. Create a 1.21.1 Fabric server 2. **Import the Server version** of Authentic Beta into your launcher using the **Client** method described previously! 3. Copy the **mods** and **config folders** into your **server folder**!
2. **Play!** ## Q&A ### Q: Server support? A: Yes! Read the **How to Install** section! ### Q: Where do I report issues or make suggestions? A: Join the **Discord server**, or go to the **Codeberg** page! ### Q: Is this just nostalgia bait? A: No, even if you never played Beta you can still enjoy Authentic Beta! ### Q: Forge? A: No :3 ### Q: Can I use this as a base for my own modpack? A: Of course! Just credit me and let me know about it, please :3 ### Q: What's the difference between the 1.20.1 and 1.21.1 versions? A: The 1.20.1 version has more accurate mechanics compared to the 1.21.1 version, as KubeJS has not been ported to Fabric 1.21.1. ### Q: Is this modpack completely accurate to Beta 1.7.3? A: No, and it never really can be. Despite this, I am trying to make it as accurate as I possibly can within my abilities. There are some things I've left in intentionally, such as sign editing and inventory QoL, because I feel that it would not be beneficial to remove them for the sake of complete accuracy (although this is always subject to change, mostly depending on how easy it is to change :P). ### Q: Does this project use AI? A: Absolutely not. *** ## Credits [Nostalgica Reverie](https://modrinth.com/organization/nostalgica) - [Moderner Beta](https://modrinth.com/project/xkrdwmh2) and [Nostalgic Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/project/l1rj36Ob) [Shvara](https://modrinth.com/user/FlKn5eRh) - [Achievements](https://modrinth.com/datapack/achievements) [PoeticRainbow](https://modrinth.com/user/3qtpUbx1) - [Golden Days](https://modrinth.com/project/BFzJ6aQL) [millennIumAMbiguity](https://modrinth.com/user/neVIzwaO) - [No More Horizontal Logs](https://modrinth.com/project/1gXbjQe7) [Fneifnox](https://modrinth.com/user/23EgX7ju) - [Custom Mob Attributes](https://modrinth.com/project/f12jSNQc) [jelokil](https://modrinth.com/user/tIQixe2s) - [Beta English](https://modrinth.com/project/SfGXT8nc) ...and many more! Thank you!
